title: ElasticsearchAssetComponent
description: Index data into Elasticsearch or query ES and write results to a database table.

asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this component.

elasticsearch_url_env_var.description: Env var containing the Elasticsearch URL (e.g. http://localhost:9200).

api_key_env_var.description: Env var containing the Elastic Cloud API key.

mode.description: Operation mode: index documents from a DB source, or query ES and write hits to a DB table.

source_database_url_env_var.description: Env var with source SQLAlchemy DB URL (index mode).

source_table_name.description: Source table to read from in index mode.

id_field.description: Column to use as the Elasticsearch document _id (index mode).

chunk_size.description: Number of documents per bulk-index request (index mode).

query.description: JSON Elasticsearch DSL query body (query mode). Defaults to match_all.

database_url_env_var.description: Env var with destination SQLAlchemy DB URL (query mode).

table_name.description: Destination table name for query mode results.

if_exists.description: Behaviour when the destination table already exists (query mode).

upstream_asset_key.description: Single upstream asset key for lineage.

deps.description: Additional upstream asset keys for lineage.
